---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something not working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what's happening.

**Install type**
- [ ] Home Assistant add-on
- [ ] Docker
- [ ] Frontend-only (HACS / manual www copy)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to trigger it:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or server logs.

**Environment (please complete):**
- Now Showing version: [e.g. 2.1.6]
- Home Assistant version: [e.g. 2025.4]
- Browser/tablet: [e.g. Fully Kiosk Browser, Chrome on iOS]
- Backend: [Plex / Jellyfin / Emby / Kodi / other]
